title: Kazzmon's ExtraVanilla
description: A datapack that overhauls the vanilla Minecraft experience, and adds many quality and exciting additions to the base game.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/O9HMP2v3RfQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

Kazzmon's ExtraVanilla is a datapack that aims to add a lot of creative and challenging additions and mechanics to the Vanilla Minecraft experience.

This datapack includes various crafting recipes and drops from mobs and blocks, that should aid players in their progression through the game. New Weapons and Special Items may also be crafted or obtained throughout the journey.

Most of the features are listed in the included Changelog file. This datapack is developed to be used for SMP Servers, and if there are any issues you've encountered, feel free to let me know. Thanks!

A Guide Book for all the information you may need for this datapack is available in my [Patreon](patreon.com/kazzmon). You can also view it [here](http://adfoc.us/7926191) but with some skippable ads and limited functionality.

***It is not recommended to use this datapack with Recipe Unlockers or it might not work properly.***

You can change certain Datapack Settings by using the command ***/function kazzmon.extravanilla:datapack_settings﻿***

If you like my work, consider supporting me on my [Patreon](patreon.com/kazzmon).
You can also join my Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/bCcwHeAxjd).
